resources.string: Tap the lemon tree to select a lemon
Keep tapping the lemon to squeeze it
Tap the lemonade to drink it
Tap the empty glass to start again
There is a lemon tree. Tap it to pick a lemon.
Great! You picked a lemon. Keep tapping to squeeze it into lemonade.
Nice! Your lemonade is ready. Tap to drink it.
The glass is empty. Tap to start again.
